title: Lithic's A TFC Addon
description: A mod adding small additions to tfc for the lithic smp
body:
**THIS DOES NOT HAVE THE COINS! THAT IS [THIS MOD HERE](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithic-coins)**

This mod is an addon mod for the lithic smp, consisting of the ideas of the players.

Current features include:
- Metal spindles
- Aluminum and stainless steel jar lids
- A system for returing jar lids
- An expansive system of moth breeding similar to firmalife's bees, as a new way to gather silk.
- Mullberries and mullberry trees to feed the moths
- Soy milk and cheese
- A horse breeding upgrade
- POTATO BREAD
- A fruit basket for easy fruit picking
and many of secrets.

This was made for the lithic smp which is not currently running but heres the discord anyways https://discord.gg/4uCEu7yQD4
